parties.name: JEFFERSON, ELAINE V. 590 FULTON ST., APT. J SAN FRANCISCO, CA 415922785

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Petitioners: Kevin Lewis and Elaine Jefferson present in pro per for the minor, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Jelani Isaiah Jefferson-Lewis.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-16-2003 Reset To Jan-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Elaine V. Jefferson present in pro per, there being no appearance by the Minor's father and without signature on the petition, this matter is continued to Jan. 27, 2004 at 09:00 a.m. Dept. 218. Ms. Jefferson to serve notice on Minor's father of the new hearing date.
Amended OSC signed in open court.
